testcase.name: integrationTest_Login_WrongPassword_RedirectsWithError
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.first_name, u1_0.last_login, u1_0.last_name, u1_0.password, u1_0.username from users u1_0 Hibernate: delete from users where id=? Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.email=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, first_name, last_login, last_name, password, username, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-07-14T19:13:18.571+05:30 INFO 21044 --- [GameApp] [ main] com.gameapp.service.UserService : Registered new user 'wrongpwuser' 2026-07-14T19:13:18.573+05:30 DEBUG 21044 --- [GameApp] [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing POST /login Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.first_name, u1_0.last_login, u1_0.last_name, u1_0.password, u1_0.username from users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? 2026-07-14T19:13:18.576+05:30 DEBUG 21044 --- [GameApp] [ main] com.gameapp.service.UserService : Loaded user 'wrongpwuser' for authentication 2026-07-14T19:13:18.895+05:30 DEBUG 21044 --- [GameApp] [ main] o.s.s.a.dao.DaoAuthenticationProvider : Failed to authenticate since password does not match stored value 2026-07-14T19:13:18.897+05:30 DEBUG 21044 --- [GameApp] [ main] o.s.s.authentication.ProviderManager : Authentication failed with provider DaoAuthenticationProvider since Bad credentials 2026-07-14T19:13:18.897+05:30 DEBUG 21044 --- [GameApp] [ main] o.s.s.authentication.ProviderManager : Denying authentication since all attempted providers failed 2026-07-14T19:13:18.898+05:30 DEBUG 21044 --- [GameApp] [ main] o.s.s.web.DefaultRedirectStrategy : Redirecting to /login?error=true

[Principal=org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User [Username=dashuser, Password=[PROTECTED], Enabled=true, AccountNonExpired=true, CredentialsNonExpired=true, AccountNonLocked=true, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]], Credentials=[PROTECTED], Authenticated=true, Details=null, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]]] 2026-07-14T19:13:20.151+05:30 DEBUG 21044 --- [GameApp] [ main] testcase.name: integrationTest_Register_DuplicateUsername_NoSave
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.first_name, u1_0.last_login, u1_0.last_name, u1_0.password, u1_0.username from users u1_0 Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.email=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, first_name, last_login, last_name, password, username, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-07-14T19:13:20.462+05:30 INFO 21044 --- [GameApp] [ main] com.gameapp.service.UserService : Registered new user 'existing' Hibernate: select count(*) from users u1_0 2026-07-14T19:13:20.464+05:30 DEBUG 21044 --- [GameApp] [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing POST /register 2026-07-14T19:13:20.464+05:30 DEBUG 21044 --- [GameApp] [ main] o.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter : Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous SecurityContext 2026-07-14T19:13:20.464+05:30 DEBUG 21044 --- [GameApp] [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Secured POST /register Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select count(*) from users u1_0
